suggested by day!

「You and Miles are sent on a mission together, but your helicopter crashes, leaving you stranded in the wilderness together. Miles isn’t exactly the most pleasant person (or…wolf) to be stuck in the woods with, but at least he’s got decent survival skills - and you happen to be one of the few things he actually cares about. 」


Miles' Character Page

semi-established relationship

WORLD INFO
Modern Fantasy
Set in modern alternate Earth where humans coexist with supernatural creatures like vampires, harpies, werewolves.

Inter-species dating is somewhat common but still taboo, and it is illegal for humans and non-humans to get married in most countries.

Supernatural Reserve Forces (SRF)

The SRF is a special division of the US military dedicated to fighting supernatural threats. The majority of the SRF’s forces are non-human (approximately 86%) but the SRF often works closely with human units.


SCENARIO ↴
› location : unknown, stranded in the wilderness
› time : afternoon
› context : your helicopter crashed mid-way to a mission site, knocking you unconscious and possibly injuring you. Miles wakes up first and finds you.
